description: Mango Team presents their demo at the Solana x Serum DeFi Hackathon, showcasing their platform's features and functionalities. The team discusses various aspects of trading, including margin accounts and liquidity options, while engaging with the audience on Twitch.
topic_summary: Mango Team's demo highlights their trading platform, focusing on margin accounts and liquidity features [t=0:16]. The presentation includes a live demonstration of trading functionalities and community engagement [t=132:64].
